title: hymenaea oblongifolia var. oblongifolia
intro: Hymenaea oblongifolia var. oblongifolia, also known as the Indian kino tree, is a tree species native to India and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its heartwood, which is rich in tannins and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hymenaea oblongifolia var. oblongifolia include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against infections, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. Hymenaea oblongifolia var. oblongifolia is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
